pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will target the wrong JDK version (17) if this property is not updated, failing the migration requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for the target Java version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the release flag, the compiler might not strictly enforce API compatibility with the target JDK version, or may default to the compiler's own version.
